verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Are you wondering what could be the meaning of your life Are you wondering which way to choose Do you feel unsure of God's plan for you Let Him do it and He will see you through

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But as for me and my house we will serve the Lord But as for me and my house we will serve the Lord No matter what they say I'll wait for the day Till the Lord takes me there

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's time for you to decide to give all or nothing Life without Him is sorrow, never ending So stand up, be counted then start to sing Cause with Jesus in your heart we've got everything
